questions.title: How many things do you keep in mind at once?
questions.help: 1 = one at a time; 5 = many layers in parallel

questions.title: How much new appears per hour?
questions.help: 1 = almost nothing new; 5 = many new terms/rules/tools

questions.title: How quickly do you notice if it works (feedback)?
Does the approach change a lot with context?
How bad are mistakes?
questions.help: 1 = easy fix; 5 = heavy loss of time/work/data

questions.title: How many different abilities do you combine?
